mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-04_2#Sql001 */ INTO T_JP_ORDER ( IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_ID, SPECIFIC_KBN, BRAND_CD, MARKET, ORDER_STATUS, TRADE_KBN, QUANTITY, LIMIT, AZUKARI_KBN, PAYMENT_LIMIT, REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE, REQUEST_TYPE, ORDER_SYUBETSU, ORDER_SYUBETSU_LIST, KANYU_KBN, JUTYU_KBN, CHECK_INSIDER, CHECK_SOR, CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT, SHIKIN_SEIKAKU_KBN, USER_ID, CANCEL_USER_ID, TESUURYOU_KBN, ALTER_FLG, AUTO_ORDER_KIND, RBE_ORDER_KIND, SASINARI_KBN, PRICE, TRIGGER_ZONE, TRIGGER_PRICE, OCO_SASINARI_KBN, OCO_SASHINE, DONE_SASINARI_KBN, DONE_SASHINE, DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND, DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE, DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN, DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN, DONE_OCO_SASHINE, DONE_LIMIT, JO_ZEI_KBN, ALTER_ORDER_NUM, RBE_ORDER_STATUS, ORDER_TYPE, ORDER_NUM, ACCEPT_DATE, ACCEPT_TIME, SHUBETU, CODE, MESSAGE, ESTIMATE_PRICE, AMOUNT, COMMISSION, CONSUMPTION_TAX, CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX, NET_AMOUNT, COST, TRADE_DATE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, ACCEPT_LIMIT, DONE_ACCEPT_LIMIT, COM_ID_R, AC_POSITION, AC_POSITION_AFTER, AC_BALANCE, AC_BALANCE_AFTER, ORDERED_MARKET, TRADE_DEFICIT_AMOUNT, ISA_BUY_LIMIT, JRNISA_TRANSFER_AMOUNT, SOR_LINK_KBN, UNCLOSED_QUANTITY, UNCLOSED_QUANTITY_AFTER, MARGIN_CAPABILITY, MARGIN_CAPABILITY_AFTER, ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE, ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE_AFTER, APP_INTEREST_RATES, APP_LENDING_STOCK, PREMIUM, TPOINT, TPOINT_AFTER, DAILY_CREDIT_KBN, PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE, DATE_KBN, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, CCS_SEND_DATE ) VALUES( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, 1, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.customerId}, #{req.specificKbn}, #{req.brandCode}, #{req.market}, '0', #{req.tradeKbn}, #{req.quantity}, #{req.limit}, null, #{req.paymentLimit}, #{req.repaymentMethodType}, #{req.requestType}, #{req.orderSyubetsu}, #{req.orderSyubetsuList}, #{req.kanyuKbn}, #{req.receiveOrder}, #{req.checkInsider}, #{req.checkSor}, null, null, #{req.userId}, null, #{req.tesuuryouKbn}, null, null, #{req.rbeOrderKind}, #{req.sashinariKbn}, #{req.limitPrice}, #{req.triggerZone}, #{req.triggerPrice}, #{req.ocoSashinariKbn}, #{req.ocoSashine}, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, #{req.capitalGainTaxKbn}, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, #{req.dailyCreditKbn}, #{req.paymentDeadlineDate}, #{req.dateKbn}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.intermediaryEmpCd}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser}, null )

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-04_2#Sql002 */ INTO J_ORDER_POSITION_LINK ( IFA_ORDER_NO, BRAND_CODE, OPEN_TRADE_KBN, OPEN_MARKET, PAYMENT_LIMIT, ORG_NEW_TRADE_DATE, OPEN_TRADE_DATE, OPEN_PRICE, CONT_POSITION, UNACTUAL_QUANTITY, DEPOSIT_TYPE, QUANTITY, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, #{req.brandCode}, #{req.openTradeKbn}, #{req.openMarket}, #{req.paymentLimit}, #{req.orgNewTradeDate}, #{req.openTradeDate}, #{req.openPrice}, #{req.contPosition}, #{req.unactualQuantity}, #{req.depositType}, #{req.quantity}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-04_2#Sql003 */ T_JP_ORDER SET UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , UPDATE_USER = #{req.updateUser} , ACCEPT_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') WHERE IFA_ORDER_NO = #{req.ifaOrderNo} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = 1
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-04_2#Sql004 */ TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_T_JP_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0') AS IFA_ORDER_NO FROM DUAL
